subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath been received, and its contents were a cause of joy to hearts and a testimony to attainment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق مکتوب واصل گردید مضمون سبب انشراح صدور بود و دلیل بر حصول
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
